info.title: SDKWork Web Backend API
info.description: SDKWork Web Server management and control-plane API.

get.summary: Retrieve the Nginx configuration and certificate bundle

parameters.name: ifSyncVersion
parameters.description: When it matches the current tenant manifest fingerprint, returns unchanged=true with empty bundles.

total.description: Total item count as a string to avoid JavaScript precision loss.

agentToken.description: Bootstrap agent credential; returned once at registration.

activeConfigs.description: Number of active nginx configs reported by the agent as a string.

lastSyncVersion.description: Last successfully applied syncVersion reported by the edge agent.

syncVersion.description: Stable SHA-256 fingerprint of active nginx configs and certificates for the tenant.

unchanged.description: True when ifSyncVersion matched syncVersion; bundles are omitted to save bandwidth.

version.description: Config revision number as a string to avoid JavaScript precision loss.

total.description: Total item count as a string to avoid JavaScript precision loss.

operatorId.description: Operator user id as a string to avoid JavaScript precision loss.

targetId.description: Target snowflake id as a string to avoid JavaScript precision loss.

total.description: Total item count as a string to avoid JavaScript precision loss.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md section 15.3.
